general.name: mos_target_gaiadr2_tmass_best_neighbour_parquet
general.description: The Gaia DR2 vs. 2MASS PSC crossmatch provided by the Gaia collaboration. See https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR2/Catalogue_consolidation/chap_cu9val_cu9val/ssec_cu9xma/sssec_cu9xma_extcat.html for complete details.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaiadr2_tmass_best_neighbour.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

tmass_oid.name: tmass_oid
tmass_oid.description: Additional numeric unique source identifier of 2MASS, increasing with declination

number_of_neighbours.name: number_of_neighbours
number_of_neighbours.description: Number of sources in the 2MASS Catalogue which match the Gaia source within position errors

number_of_mates.name: number_of_mates
number_of_mates.description: Number of other Gaia sources that have as best-neighbour the same 2MASS source.

best_neighbour_multiplicity.name: best_neighbour_multiplicity
best_neighbour_multiplicity.description: Number of neighbours with same probability as best neighbour

original_ext_source_id.name: original_ext_source_id
original_ext_source_id.description: The unique source identifier in the original 2MASS catalogue

angular_distance.name: angular_distance
angular_distance.description: Angular distance between the two sources

gaia_astrometric_params.name: gaia_astrometric_params
gaia_astrometric_params.description: Number of Gaia astrometric params used
